name: Oude IJsselstreek (Netherlands)
description: A white field with green diagonals bearing the name 'gemeente Oude IJsselstreek'.
history: Flag of the municipality of Oude IJsselstreek in the province of Gelderland, formed in 2005. The flag is the municipality's logo/wordmark banner rather than a heraldic design.

features.role: the municipal logo and wordmark 'gemeente Oude IJsselstreek'
